channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Meta Tests AI Subscriptions and Rolls Out New Paid Plans for Facebook, Instagram - WSJ
item.description:
1. Meta Tests AI Subscriptions and Rolls Out New Paid Plans for Facebook, Instagram  WSJ
  2. Meta rolls out paid subscription plans for Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp  Fox Business
  3. Meta to start testing AI subscription services, with cheapest plan at $7.99 a month  CNBC
  4. Meta to Sell AI Chatbot Subscriptions in Bid to Offset Spending  Bloomberg.com
  5. Meta Copies Snapchat’s Homework Again With ‘Plus’ Features for Instagram and Facebook  WIRED

item.title: Can Nvidia’s $150 Billion Bet on Taiwan Succeed Despite Rising Geopolitical Tensions? - Barron's
item.description:
1. Can Nvidia’s $150 Billion Bet on Taiwan Succeed Despite Rising Geopolitical Tensions?  Barron's
  2. Nvidia to spend $150 billion a year in Taiwan, 'epicentre' of AI revolution, says CEO  Reuters
  3. Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans  CNBC
  4. NVIDIA GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX: Live Updates on What’s Next in AI  NVIDIA Blog
  5. Jensen Huang pledges $150 billion a year in Taiwan for Nvidia  Yahoo Finance

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg’s mega yacht docks in Seattle in the wake of Meta layoffs - KUOW
item.description:
1. Mark Zuckerberg’s mega yacht docks in Seattle in the wake of Meta layoffs  KUOW
  2. Zuckerberg-linked superyacht draws crowds in Seattle after Meta layoffs  KING5.com
  3. Meta lays off nearly 1,400 Washington employees in latest tech workforce cut  Fox Business
  4. Zuckerberg's $300M superyacht passes through Seattle's Ballard locks right when Meta cuts 1,400 local jobs  MyNorthwest.com
  5. Mark Zuckerberg’s superyacht goes through the Ballard Locks  My Ballard
